name: Nick Cassoni's Turkey Crunch Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Diced cooked turkey, chicken or ham
1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup (10 1/2 oz)
Chow mein noodles or Crushed potato chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first six ingredients together.
2. Stir the soup into the mayonnaise.
3. Toss with turkey mixture.
4. Put into a 2 quart casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle with chow mein noodles or crushed potato chips.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bubbling.
